creator: tota@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Philip,

ja-jpmobile-0.1.3 requires rubygem-rspec 2.0.0 or later as follows.

# pwd
/usr/ports/japanese/rubygem-jpmobile
# make install
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
===>  Found saved configuration for ja-jpmobile-0.1.2_1
===>  Extracting for ja-jpmobile-0.1.3
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
===>  Found saved configuration for ja-jpmobile-0.1.2_1
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for rubygem/jpmobile-0.1.3.gem.
===>   ja-jpmobile-0.1.3 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/ruby18 - found
===>  Patching for ja-jpmobile-0.1.3
===>   ja-jpmobile-0.1.3 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/ruby18 - found
===>   ja-jpmobile-0.1.3 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/gem18 - found
===>   ja-jpmobile-0.1.3 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/ruby18 - found
===>  Configuring for ja-jpmobile-0.1.3
===>  Installing for ja-jpmobile-0.1.3
===>   ja-jpmobile-0.1.3 depends on package: rubygem-rails>=3.0.1 - found
===>   ja-jpmobile-0.1.3 depends on package:
ja-jpmobile-ipaddresses>=0.0.1 - found
===>   ja-jpmobile-0.1.3 depends on package: ja-jpmobile-terminfo>=0.0.2 - found
===>   ja-jpmobile-0.1.3 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/gem18 - found
===>   ja-jpmobile-0.1.3 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/ruby18 - found
===>   ja-jpmobile-0.1.3 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/ruby18 - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if japanese/rubygem-jpmobile already installed
/usr/bin/env  /usr/local/bin/gem18 install -l --no-update-sources
--no-ri --install-dir /usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8
/usr/ports/distfiles/rubygem/jpmobile-0.1.3.gem -- --build-args
ERROR:  Error installing /usr/ports/distfiles/rubygem/jpmobile-0.1.3.gem:
       jpmobile requires rspec (>= 2.0.0, runtime)
*** Error code 1

I have waited for rspec2.

Thanks,

-- 
TAKATSU Tomonari
